name: commerce.taxes.calculate
description: Calculate taxes for a purchase with multiple line items

addressLine1.description: The first line of the address. For example, number and street name.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the address. For example, office suite or apartment number.

addressLine3.description: The third line of the address, if needed.

adminArea1.description: The highest level sub-division in a country, which is usually a province, state, or ISO-3166-2 subdivision; formatted for postal delivery.

adminArea2.description: The city, town, or village. Smaller than `adminArea1`.

adminArea3.description: The sub-locality, suburb, neighborhood, or district. Smaller than `adminArea2`.

adminArea4.description: The neighborhood, ward, or district. Smaller than `adminArea3` or `subLocality`.

countryCode.description: The [two-character ISO 3166-1 code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1) that identifies the country or region.

postalCode.description: The postal code, which is the zip code or equivalent.

classification.description: The ID or code for the item's classification.

destination.description: The location to which the item is being sent. e.g. the customer's address. Overrides the top-level value if provided.

id.description: The client-defined ID for the line. This could be a UUID of the SKU, or a shipping method/package name.

origin.description: The location from which the item is originating. Overrides the top-level value if provided.

quantity.description: The number of units being purchased.

subtotalPrice.description: The money amount for the total quantity being purchased.

type.description: The type of the calculation line.

unitPrice.description: The money amount for a single unit of the item being purchased.

value.description: The value, which might be: An integer for currencies like JPY that are not typically fractional; or, a decimal fraction for currencies like TND that are subdivided into thousandths.

taxAmounts.description: The individual tax amounts for the rates that were applied to the purchase. A combined summary of all of the rates that applied across all of the lines.

totalTaxAmount.description: The total money amount of tax calculated for the purchase. A sum of each individual line tax amount.

calculationLine.description: An individual line item that was calculated.

taxAmounts.description: The individual tax amounts for the rates that were applied to the line.

totalTaxAmount.description: The total money amount of tax calculated for the line.

id.description: The client-defined ID for the line.

calculationLine.description: An individual line item that was used in the calculation, passed back unmodified from the request.

calculationMethod.description: The method that was used to apply the rate to a purchase amount.

calculatedRate.description: The rate that was used for the calculated amount.

calculatedRateAmount.description: The rate value represented as a fixed money amount.

appliedPercentage.description: The percentage applied by the rate, out of 100.

percentage.description: The percentage value of the rate, out of 100.

calculatedRatePercentage.description: The rate value represented as a percentage.

value.description: The value, which might be: An integer for currencies like JPY that are not typically fractional; or, a decimal fraction for currencies like TND that are subdivided into thousandths.

money.description: A money represents the monetary value and currency for a financial transaction.
